sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17848" key="au)topagh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-πᾰγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πήγνυμι</etym>) <sense id="n17848.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compact of itself,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γῆ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0536.tlg001:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rough,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πέτροι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θαλάμαι,</foreign> of a swarm of bees in the air, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.404</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
